name: Quaker's: Fruitful Morning Meusli
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Apple juice or apricot nectar
recipeInstructions:
1. Fresh fruit: any combination of banana, poaches, nectarines, or strawberries.
2. Combine all ingredients except nuts; mix well.
3. Cover; refrigerate 8 hours or overnight.
4. Serve cold; sprinkle with nuts if desired.
5. Refrigerate in an air-tight container up to 4 days.
For extra flavor, toast nuts by spreading them evenly in a small shallow baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 5 to 8 minutes or until light golden brown, stirring occasionally. Or, spread nuts on a microwaveable plate. Microwave on HIGH for 1 minute; stir. Continue microwaving, checking every 30 seconds, until nuts are crunchy.
